channel.title: Chapter 26: OpenML and Benchmarking on Introduction to Machine Learning (I2ML)
channel.description: Recent content in Chapter 26: OpenML and Benchmarking on Introduction to Machine Learning (I2ML)

item.title: Chapter 26.01: Large-Scale Benchmarking and OpenML
item.description: We explain why benchmarking is needed beyond theoretical analysis, present the steps of proper benchmarking, and introduce OpenML.

item.title: Chapter 26.02: Model Selection and Hypothesis Testing
item.description: We discuss what questions benchmarks can answer, the value of hypothesis tests, and which tests to use in different benchmarking scenarios.

item.title: Chapter 26.03: Practical Performance Evaluation
item.description: We cover how to visualize model performance beyond standard metrics using lift charts and calibration curves.
